nasb.text: All your fortifications are fig trees with ripe fruit— When shaken, they fall into the eater’s mouth.

esv.text: All your fortresses are like fig trees with first-ripe figs— if shaken they fall into the mouth of the eater.

cnv.text: 你一切堡壘，如同無花果樹上初熟的果子， 若被搖撼， 就必落在想吃的人口中。

ccb.text: 你所有的堡垒都像无花果树上的初熟果子， 一摇树，果子就掉进吃的人口中。
